design_philosophy: Modern, minimalist, and corporate/governmental. Prioritizes data clarity, authority, and functional beauty. Uses a crisp structural layout with high contrast for readability and a distinct professional tone fitting for a municipal government fleet management system.

hierarchy.h1: text-3xl sm:text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-bold tracking-tight text-slate-900

spacing_and_layout.layout_strategy: Sidebar navigation (fixed left) with a sticky top header. Main content uses a subtle gray background with flat, rectangular, white containers for data tables. Borders are crisp 1px solid (border-border).

components.buttons: Flat, rectangular or slightly rounded (rounded-md). Primary buttons use Government Blue (#1e3a8a). Hover states must darken the hue and maintain high contrast text.
components.cards: Cardless or flat cards with 1px border. Avoid heavy shadows. Use soft ambient shadow (shadow-sm) on hover.
components.tables: Dense, highly readable data tables. Left-aligned text for data, center for status badges. Alternating row colors (subtle slate-50) for better scannability.
components.forms: Inputs with clear 1px borders, subtle focus rings in primary blue. Labels must be clearly visible above inputs.
components.sidebar: Dark slate (#0f172a) or deep blue (#1e3a8a) background with white text, OR crisp white with slate text and subtle right border. Ensure high contrast for active menu items.

motion.hover: Subtle background color shifts and slight lift (-translate-y-[1px]) for interactive cards.
motion.page_load: Fade in with a slight upward motion for lists and tables.

images.description: Brasão PMTF (Prefeitura Municipal de Teixeira de Freitas) - Use in header/sidebar and login screen
Modern corporate/government abstract background for the login screen to add depth and professionalism

specific_instructions_for_main_agent: Use the provided Brasão PMTF logo url in the login screen, the main sidebar/header, and in the PDF export.
ADMIN has full CRUD access to users and vehicles, and can change vehicle statuses.
PADRÃO has read-only access to vehicle lists (Atividade, Manutenção, Inativos), and can export PDF/print.
Required pages/menus: Login, Cadastrar Veículo, Veículos em Atividade, Veículos em Manutenção, Veículos Inativos, Usuários, and Histórico de Lotação.

For PDF export (jspdf + jspdf-autotable) and Printing (react-to-print): Ensure the generated report includes the report name, current date, tabular data, and the Brasão PMTF logo as a miniature in the header.
Use standard Shadcn components (Table, Dialog, Form, Input, Button, Select) but customize them to match the strict corporate/governmental layout (sharp edges, flat surfaces, minimal shadows).
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='login-button').
